title: Move commands.md to commands-demo.md and update links
body: Per  #4407, the links in the commands.md page to the various man pages have changed.  The README.md was updated to the new readthedocs page for the docs.  Rename the commands.md page to a commands-demo.md page or something aggreable, leave a breadcrumb page behind at commands.md, and then update the links on the page for the man pages to their location at readthedocs.

comments.body: @Zyqsempai I'm super jealous of your profile icon....
This issue had no activity for 30 days. In the absence of activity or the "do-not-close" label, the issue will be automatically closed within 7 days.
@TomSweeneyRedHat is this still something you are interested in?
@rhatdan yeah, we ought to touch this up at some point.  Added the do-not-close label.
This is still open for contributions? If yes what's is missing?
Sure, just no one has stepped up to the plate to make an PR, if you have the time @cpanato We would love to see it.
sorry for the delay, PR today :) @rhatdan
